productDisplayName: Nike Men Club Pique Polo Orange T-shirt
description: Composition Orange polo T-shirt for men made of 100% cotton, has a ribbed collar, short sleeves, stitch detailing, buttoned chest placket, nike swoosh appliquéd on the left chest and a vented hem Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash cold at 30 degrees with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach or dry clean Tumble dry low Cool iron; do not iron on decorations Get comfortable in style with this polo T-shirt from nike. The soft cotton fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable during fun times with friends, while the brand logo adds style. Pair this tee with your favourite denims and sports shoes.
